title: Compact farms
description: Sacrifice full chests of a single item to get an infinite generator for that item.
body:
# Compact Farms
Sacrifice full chests of a single item to get an infinite generator. Great configurability using a dialog config menu. 

## Purpose
I made the datapack mainly because:
 - to reduce lag from big farms on servers
 - reward players for grinding lots of items with an infinite supply
 - allow farming of certain non-renewable items 
 - easier farming of certain items
## The farms
After sacrificing enough chests of items, an armor stand will be spawned that will periodically insert the items into the chest it is standing on. 
You can upgrade the generator by giving the armor stand a nether star, then it will generate two items each cycle.
## Config
Datapack offers to configure:
- how often to generate items
- how many full chests to sacrifice to obtain a generator
- limit how many generators can one player spawn
- enable/disable each item
- enable/disable tier-II generators
## How to use
To sacrifice a chest, stand on it and use /trigger fiab_sacrifice. in chat you will get the information how many you will need to sacrifice before spawning a generator. once at that threshold, an armor stand will appear at your feet.

You can use /trigger fiab_info to view how many sacrifices of each item did you make.

Careful, generator isnt invulnerable and can be destroyed, but it can be moved around with water and other stuff. breaking it will basically void all your hard work, but i plan to make more adjustments so you can replace it if you break it accidentally.



## How to config 
open the main config menu using /function knize1007:config ; the dialog menu has a config page for every item this datapack supports, and also group config to modify multiple items at once. 
## Default settings
By default, every item needs 6 full chests of sacrifies to spawn a generator, limit 50 per player, generates 1 item every 2 seconds, and has tier-II upgrades enabled. every item that is renewable is enabled by default.


## TL;DR
Sacrifice chests full of a single item to receive an armor stand that generates infinite amount of that item

## Future plans
- Add more groups to config
- Breakable armor stands that can be placed again
- Adjust default values
- In-game guide
- Advancements
